title: Simply Vanilla-ish
description: A mostly vanilla modpack for mc 1.21.1, giving the player mostly decor, and qol mods.
body:
# A Vanilla-ish Modpack For people who want simple QoL changes and not a completely new game.

## About
This modpack hopes to create a very close to minecraft gameplay with some spice, created after noticing a lack of this type of pack for the latest version. Mods that will adhere to mincrafts gameplay only changing systems that are tedious or annoying to handle. Other than that the back has decor to create the home of your dreams.

## features
- Never get lost again with journeymap and jade!

- Mining large veins or areas can be tedious at best so ive included ftb ultimine!

- Build to your hearts desire with stoneworks and Macaw's decor mods!

- Shaders to make your world pop out with complementary shaders!

- And other mods to improve your building abillity!

## Updates
I will be updating as frequently as I can with school and life and plan to continue to update to newer versions.

## Usage
you may use the modpack for a video or otherwise without direct permission, just dont claim its yours.
